en.name: HUMAN KIDNEY
en.info: Inspect the kidney in AR and tap the numbered notes to understand the main filtering structures.
en.hint: Use rotate, scale and labels while the kidney model is active.

parts.label: Capsule
parts.title: CAPSULE
parts.info: The capsule is the thin outer covering that helps protect the kidney.
parts.hint: This outer layer wraps around the kidney surface.

parts.label: Cortex
parts.title: CORTEX
parts.info: The cortex is the outer region where blood filtration begins inside the kidney.
parts.hint: This layer sits just beneath the capsule.

parts.label: Renal Medulla
parts.title: RENAL MEDULLA
parts.info: The renal medulla contains the pyramids that help concentrate urine as it moves inward.
parts.hint: This deeper region lies toward the center of the kidney.

parts.label: Renal Artery
parts.title: RENAL ARTERY
parts.info: The renal artery brings oxygen-rich blood into the kidney for filtration.
parts.hint: This red vessel feeds blood into the kidney.

parts.label: Renal Vein
parts.title: RENAL VEIN
parts.info: The renal vein carries filtered blood away from the kidney and back toward circulation.
parts.hint: This blue vessel exits the kidney after filtration.

parts.label: Ureter
parts.title: URETER
parts.info: The ureter transports urine from the kidney down toward the bladder.
parts.hint: This narrow tube leaves the lower side of the kidney.
